$comment: Every collector must emit the Signal shape in monitor/schema/signal.ts. Active sources use implemented RSS, public Telegram, or stable HTML snapshot transports. Planned sources still need credentials, onboarding, a specialized query, or a proven reliable endpoint. Independent agencies and country specialists are preferred over broad social monitoring.

sources.notes: EUI Global Citizenship Observatory — academic tracking of nationality-law changes worldwide.
Investment-migration trade press — CBI/RBI program changes, often ahead of official gazettes.
Ladislas Maurice — independent, on-the-ground residency/citizenship reporting; has broken program changes (e.g. Argentina CBI) ahead of trade press.

Curated exception to the no-broad-social rule. Public channel preview by Ladislas Maurice; often contains residency/citizenship findings and links before the main blog. Discovery only and always requires primary-source verification.
Free Notes from the Road newsletter. Keep separate from the blog RSS and public Telegram preview so private-list or early updates can be captured, then deduplicate by canonical article URL.

Global immigration law-firm client alerts with country labels, dates, summaries, and public canonical articles. High-value newsletter candidate for changes to visas, residence, citizenship applications, fees, and processing.
Industry-body newsletter and archive focused on investment migration. Useful for programme and regulatory leads; commercial or opinion content must be discarded by triage.
Agency news index with dated residence, citizenship, descent, and CBI updates. No verified feed was found, so this needs a narrow HTML index adapter and per-article canonical URLs.
Andrew Henderson — high volume, uneven signal-to-noise, but covers program changes fast (e.g. 'Armenia's New Fast-Track Residence for 2026'). Blog has no discoverable RSS; podcast feed does.

Nomad Capitalist Weekly Rundown. The publisher says it covers citizenship programme changes, offshore news, and global updates. Keep separate from the active podcast feed for independent deduplication; discovery only.
Berry Appleman & Leiden global immigration alerts. Strong coverage of work, residence, student, and permanent-residence rule changes; employment-heavy and discovery only.
Law-firm immigration updates with selectable global coverage. Useful as a second legal-practitioner signal after Fragomen and BAL; discovery only.
Residence- and citizenship-planning firm newsroom. Useful for CBI/RBI launches and closures, but commercial claims require primary-source verification and aggressive deduplication.
Official BOE open API for daily gazette summaries and consolidated legislation. Monitor Civil Code BOE-A-1889-4763 plus nationality-related new instruments.
Diário da República Eletrónico open data — verifies the 2026 nationality-law transition already recorded in citizenship_routes.json.
Boletín Oficial de la República Argentina — flagged volatile in dual_citizenship / generational_events (pending decree).
legislation.gov.uk API — verifies BN(O)/ILR changes flagged volatile in the dataset.
Official GOV.UK citizenship guidance index. Diff the index and linked birth, descent, registration, and naturalization guidance; resolve legal changes to legislation.gov.uk before publishing.
Légifrance via the PISTE gateway — requires human developer registration before an adapter can be built.
Official French nationality guidance index. Diff the index and linked birth, descent, declaration, and naturalization guidance; resolve substantive changes to Légifrance before publishing.
Official Ministry of Justice nationality guide and application profiles. Page diffs are useful operational signals; verify legal changes against Diário da República.

Current German text of the Nationality Act from the Federal Ministry of Justice and Federal Office of Justice. Monitor the consolidated HTML/XML and amendment history; translations are review aids, not controlling text.
Official Department of Foreign Affairs citizenship guidance, including the Foreign Births Register and citizenship by descent. Diff the index and linked guidance.
Official Immigration Service Delivery naturalization guidance. Monitor eligibility, reckonable residence, application procedure, fees, and linked notices.
Official Irish Statute Book. Monitor nationality acts and amending instruments referenced by reviewed canonical claims.
Monitor the Australian Citizenship Act plus Home Affairs descent, conferral, residence, and migration-program guidance linked by canonical claims.
Monitor current IRCC citizenship status, descent, birth, physical-presence, and permanent-residence guidance, including the post-15 December 2025 descent rules.
Monitor New Zealand citizenship by birth, descent, and grant guidance plus linked investor-residence pages.
Monitor USCIS and Department of State citizenship-at-birth, naturalization, and investor-residence guidance, resolving legal changes to the U.S. Code.
Monitor current Foreign Ministry citizenship guidance, including the 2025 descent reform and later circulars; resolve amendments to official legislation before publishing.
Monitor IND birth, option, naturalization, loss, and procedure guidance and cross-check changes against the Netherlands Nationality Act.
Monitor ICA citizenship eligibility and procedure guidance; resolve substantive changes against Part 10 of the Constitution and current subsidiary legislation.
Monitor SEM descent, ordinary, facilitated, and third-generation guidance; resolve changes to Fedlex and applicable cantonal rules.

Official IRCC Atom feed for Canadian immigration and citizenship announcements. Verification tier, although a reviewer must still resolve announcements to the underlying regulation, instruction, or public policy.
Official USCIS alert index for naturalization, permanent residence, work authorization, fees, forms, and policy-manual changes. Needs a narrow paginated index adapter.

Authentic Official Journal of the European Union. Configure a focused EUR-Lex RSS search for nationality, residence, migration, accession, and free-movement instruments rather than ingesting the entire journal.
Official Community Malta Agency news and guidance covering citizenship by birth, registration, naturalization, merit, and investment. Needs snapshot and linked-document diffing.

Official Greek Ministry of Migration and Asylum legislation index. Monitor new laws and gazette references, then resolve nationality-specific changes through the competent ministry and Government Gazette.
Official Colombian public-service normative repository. Build a saved-query adapter for nationality, residence-credit, visa, and naturalization terms instead of crawling the full corpus.
Official Invest in Türkiye citizenship-acquisition guidance, including qualifying investment thresholds. Pair page diffs with Resmî Gazete monitoring before publishing a rule change.
Official access point for Brazil's Diário Oficial da União. Build a keyword/API query for nationality, naturalization, migration, residence, and visa instruments.
